title: Grilled Steak with German Skewers
description: A classic steak dish paired with a hearty German-inspired skewer, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together grassy and 2 cloves of minced garlic for marinade.
Place steak in a large zip-top plastic bag. Pour marinade into bag, turning steak to coat.
Seal bag and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread german onto steak skewers, leaving 1/4 inch space between each piece.
Remove steak from marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Grill steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, grill skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until lightly charred.
Let steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve with skewers on the side.
